channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Cover off wires ecposed, 21st March
item.description:
Outside no 267 New Cross Road Street light column has cover off and wires exposed

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 265E, New Cross Road, New Cross Gate, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Street Light - Equipment damaged, pole leaning

item.title: Vehicle is sorn., 21st March
item.description:
This vehicle has been in Danson stables car park for the past 3 nights.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Danson Park, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Untaxed and no MOT, 21st March
item.description:
This vehicle had been in Danson stables car park for the past 3 nights.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Danson Park, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black sacks along pathway from 31 Boxgrove Road to Eynsham Drive., 21st March
item.description:
Reported before. Shown as “Fixed” but sacks are still there. If not possible to remove, please explain why because this is a possible health hazard.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Boxgrove Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trees stripped of bark by vandals, 21st March
item.description:
Three trees in a cluster have been completely stripped of bark from their base upwards with some kind of tool leaving large scratches and gouges. Large chunks of the bark have been thrown around and the trees are severely damaged. One tree has some bark left around the base but the smaller diameter ones have been completely ringed and stripped. Several other trees in the area show tool marks but with less severe removal of bark.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Leesons Way, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole, 21st March
item.description:
On the entrance to Asdas carpark, where the roadway joins the down ramp, a crack the full width of the road is opening up into a large long pothole.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lower Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A driver in a car hit the crossing, 21st March
item.description:
Both bollards are damaged and one is on the other side of the road. The post with the light is also damaged and the light is hanging off

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 206, Mead Way, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Next to 48 Godstow Road: pile of rubbish., 21st March
item.description:
Usual dumping place.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Godstow Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole appearing, 21st March
item.description:
This has been getting larger over the last few weeks and is causing vibrations in nearby houses when hit by large vehicles, mainly the double Decker buses which have started travelling down Penhill Road. There was an issue with a manhole cover a while back causing similar issues, this has been repaired, thank you but now another hole is appearing on the road between numbers 68 and 70.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 68, Penhill Road, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement parking at weekends stops wheelchairs, buggies etc, 21st March
item.description:
Low loader parks on pavement at park entrance Saturdays/Sundays - very bad for disabled, wheelchairs, buggies, blind
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 65, Westbury Road, West Finchley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Degrading graffiti including my full name and about my sister and my sexuality., 21st March
item.description:
51.5005999, 0.1155844 coordinates I want this removed immediately please.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cole Close, Thamesmead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Locked bicycle left in woods more than 1 week, 21st March
item.description:
A bicycle has been left secured to a tree in the woods behind Memorial Hospital for more than 1 week. The third image shows the approximate location on a map. The first image shows the forest path in the foreground, with the bicycle indicated by a yellow circle. The second image shows that the bicycle is attached to a tree using a bike lock.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shooters Hill, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken furniture left, 21st March
item.description:
A piece of broken furniture has been left by the shrubbery

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ancona Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress sofa and furniture, 21st March
item.description:
Mattress sofa and furniture dumped next to 15 New Acres road, SE280LD

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Newacres Road, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement outside 47 Chatsworth Rd, 21st March
item.description:
Hedge is so overgrown it is restricting the use of the pavement to one way and a hazard for blind and disabled people

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Chatsworth Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Obstruction - Overgrown / overhanging private tree / hedge

item.title: A 5 meter long pothole nearby the high street main bus station, 21st March
item.description:
A 5 meter long pothole nearby the high street main bus station and it is existing for almost 3 months

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Arnsberg Way, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple signs Redriff estate walker house graffitied, 21st March
item.description:
Multiple signs on the estate have a Bsats tag, or more, and on Odessa St too. This has been for around a month and has been increasing on these few streets

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Odessa Street, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bad surface, 21st March
item.description:
The surface in front of the shops is a trip hazard. Especially for disabled using wheelchair or rollator. It's uneven and is a health and safety concern. Please re-surface / make good. Thank you!!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Jamaica Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A 6 meter long pothole nearby the high street main bus station, 21st March
item.description:
The poor road surface endanger the road safety as it is nearly a main bus stop of the high street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Arnsberg Way, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 meter wide pothole in the middle of the road, 21st March
item.description:
2 meter wide pothole in the middle of the road and almost 2 months without any progress

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Arnsberg Way, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
